note: SOST Talk OTC / P2P Board (community discussion room). NOT an exchange, NOT escrow, NOT trading desk, NOT custody. SOST Protocol does not intermediate trades. (A) website/js/sost-talk.js: ROOMS extended with otc; label OTC / P2P Board; comment block pins non-custodial invariant. (B) website/js/sost-sentinel.js: classify() routes OTC vocabulary (otc, p2p, wtb, wts, buyer, seller, counterparty, quote, asking, want to buy/sell, swap sost, etc.) to the new otc room before falling into DEX/PoPC; SCAM_PATTERNS extended with guaranteed buyer/seller/escrow/liquidity, send funds first, DM me to trade, private admin deal, risk-free profit, wallet verification, fake airdrops. (C) website/sost-talk.html: 4 Rooms -> 5 Rooms; new dedicated safety banner visible only when otc room is selected, repeating the three NOT invariants + admins never DM first + small test transactions + report button + community discussion board not an exchange; renderRoomTabs hook toggles banner display. (D) docs/SOST_TALK_COMMUNITY_RULES.md: dedicated OTC / P2P Board Rules section with hard invariants, allowed/not allowed lists, liability statement. (E) website/sost-community.html: new community card mentioning the OTC / P2P Board (links to sost-talk.html otc room) framed as community discussion board not exchange/escrow. (F) website/api/talk_messages.json: one official Sentinel intro message pinned to the otc room repeating the rules at first load. Verified by static check: forbidden terms (exchange, official escrow, guaranteed liquidity, safe trade, risk-free, official buyer, SOST-mediated trade, trading desk) appear in the new content ONLY inside denial wording or scam-warning context, never as positive descriptors of the board. ZERO impact on consensus, wallet, custody, escrow contracts, PoPC, Gold Vault, mining, Beacon.
